subject: Fw: Brooklyn Project
body:
----- Forwarded Message ----
From: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
To: JEEproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Wednesday, June 6, 2007 1:38:42 PM
Subject: Fw: Brooklyn Project


----- Forwarded Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Wednesday, June 6, 2007 10:15:43 AM
Subject: FW: Brooklyn Projectmm


Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein


-----Original Message-----
From: Marvin Minsky [mailto:minsky@media.mit.edu] 
Sent: Wednesday, June 06, 2007 12:12 PM
To: epslgroff@nysgmail.com
Cc: Lesley Groff
Subject: Brooklyn Project

Dear Leslie,

I Included your old email address just in case. The message is
identical, so just discard it.


Hal Abelson wants to be the Director of the project.   I am attaching  
two copies of proposal,
one in text, other in .pdf for better printing.  (If any problem, I can
simply send the text in a mail message.
